resources.string: Version 1.1.3 - Made with ❤️ for Aspiring Developers
The ultimate mobile IDE for PHP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and MySQL development. Built for programmers, by programmers.
The Ultimate Step-by-Step Guide for New Developers

Your workspace is designed for speed. Here is what the icons at the top do:

• Menu (☰): Your "Command Center". Switch between the Editor, Database, and AI Chat.
• Save (💾): Instantly saves your progress to your phone.
• Open (📂): Import any .php, .html, or .js file from your device.
• Share (📤): Send your current code to friends or colleagues via email or social apps.
• Tabs: Just like a browser! Click any tab at the top to switch between multiple open files without losing your place.

Look at the buttons right above your keyboard—these are your "Superpowers":

• FORMAT: Tidy up messy code. It aligns everything perfectly so it looks clean.
• SNIPPETS: Need a shortcut? Click this for pre-written pieces of code (like forms or tables) to save time.
• COMPILE: Scans your code for "typos" or errors before you run it.
• RUN: The most important button! It launches a live preview so you can see your website working in real-time.
• HISTORY: Made a mistake? Go back in time! This shows your previous versions so you can undo any errors.

And-Ide makes "remembering" data simple:

• The Logic (PHP): Use PHP to handle form data or login logic. Always start with <?php.
• The Memory (SQL): Our app uses SQLite for lightning-fast, offline data. 
• The Bridge: You can use standard MySQL commands (like mysqli_query). We translate them for you automatically! 

Try this: Go to the Side Menu > Database to see your tables and test your SQL queries before writing them in code.

• Ask DDee (AI Chat): Stuck on a bug? Open the Side Menu and talk to DDee. Our AI knows your code and can fix errors for you instantly.
• File Explorer: Long-press any file in the Side Menu to Rename, Delete, or Duplicate it.
• Export (ZIP): Ready to show the world? Use "Export Project" in the Side Menu to package your whole folder into a ZIP file, perfect for uploading to a real web host.
• Search/Replace: Use the magnifying glass to find specific words in long files and replace them all at once.
💡 How to Code Like a Pro:

1. Format Often: Keep your code clean so it's easier to read.
2. Use Debug: If your code doesn't work, click RUN and look for the red text—that tells you exactly what to fix.
3. Zero Setup: You don't need a server or Wi-Fi. Everything in And-Ide works 100% offline.
4. Stay Curious: Use the SQL Cheat Sheet in the Database section to learn new commands!
Sign in to your Developer IDE

By using And-Ide, you agree to the following terms:

1. Usage: This app is provided for educational and development purposes. You are responsible for the code you write and execute.

2. Privacy: We respect your privacy. Your code is stored locally on your device unless you explicitly share or export it. Firebase Authentication is used to manage your account securely.

3. AI Assistant: The "DDee" AI assistant uses Google Gemini. Do not share sensitive personal information in the chat.

4. Disclaimer: The app is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The developers are not liable for any data loss or damages resulting from the use of this software.

5. Updates: These terms may be updated occasionally. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
I agree to the Terms and Conditions
You must agree to the terms and conditions to register.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be removed.
Failed to delete account. Please re-login and try again.

And-Ide requires certain permissions to provide a full development experience:

• Storage: To save and open your code projects.
• Location: To provide localized developer info in your profile.
• Camera: To take profile pictures.

Please grant these permissions on the next screen.
